violations.text: Various items (milk, deli meat, and cheese) were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded deli meat and turn down cooler temperature. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by small droppings in the food storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC called for service during inspection and tech arrived. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves have an accumulation of droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The floor and wall junctures behind equipment in the kitchen and food storage areas do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The wall in the food storage area is in poor repair (pealing paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added more sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Cheese and milk were observed held between 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Moved items in another cooler and/or discarded based on time/temp. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

American cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC added date. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The presence of small flies are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added additional chlorine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Cheese was observed exceeding date marking. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the residential refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Residential refrigerator located in the infant area was not in good repair (ambient of 46 degrees F). PIC adjusted knob. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (serving utensils) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC places utensils in 3 bay sink to be washed, rinsed, sanatized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Inspector observed exposed wood on counters in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
The 2 door fridge located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Ambient was observed between 42 and 44 degrees F. PIC spoke with maintenance during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside utensil storage draw, light bulb under the hood vent, and the inside fan unit of the 2 door fridge have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Inspector observed maintenance tools stored with pots and pans. PIC relocated tools during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
